chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C. P. No. S – 977 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing/Priority 1.For order on CMA No.6191/25 2.For order on CMA No.8287/24 3.For hearing of CMA No.7107/23 4.For hearing of main case 07.10.2025 Mr. Ahrar Jawaid Bhutto, advocate for respondent No.1 ---------- On last date, none appeared for petitioner and interim order was recalled. Today also none appeared for appellant. This is in spite of the petitioner filing CMA No.6191/2025. No intimation is received. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
